title: Disable automatic detection of date when load file?
author: emjimadhu
body:
I am using browser version of exceljs.

For some xlsx files, it identifies the date and parse it to object when i read a file. for some it doesnt. i just want to change the object to ISO String adter finding the date.

i tried this according to docs,

`Dates are parsed using the npm module moment. If no dateFormats are supplied, the following are used:
moment.ISO_8601
'MM-DD-YYYY'
'YYYY-MM-DD'`

i tried it to use it like this

> workbook.xlsx.load(dataURL, {
>     base64: true,
>       dateFormat: 'moment.ISO_8601'
> })

it doesnt seem to work. so i want to turn off the automatic detection of date.

how can i acheive that?

thanks in advance.

comments.author: guyonroche
andreluisce
comments.body: Can I pass a `dateFormats` to the `workbook.xlsx.read` when reading from streams?
